text.tspan: service registers ITSELF on startup; deregisters on shutdown
a separate REGISTRAR component watches deployments and registers on the service's behalf
u2022 each service needs registration client code
u2022 hard to enforce: services can lie or forget
u2022 missed deregistration u2192 stale entries (cured by heartbeat timeout)
USED BY: Eureka clients, Consul agent, Spring Cloud
u2022 service code is free of registration logic
u2022 polyglot-friendly (one registrar serves all languages)
u2022 enforces deregistration via orchestrator visibility
u2022 no protocol coupling between service and registry
u2022 extra moving piece to operate
u2022 registrar is a new dependency for correctness
AWS ECS service-discovery integration, Nomad's built-in registration
